reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

The sound is good but they constantly fail to connect with my windows 10 laptop. When they do connect, it is usually just one of the earbuds and then it disconnects a short time later. reviews.text: These are not loud at all. I can barely hear what I'm playing through them in bed, at the gym it's impossible to make anything out. You'd figure that spending this much on ear buds would mean they'd be good, high quality ear buds, but that simply is not the case.

reviews.title: but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers
reviews.text:
Time has passed since I returned them, so I don't remember exactly all the details, but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers, my main left and right speakers in my home theater are Klipsch. Excellent. But these in-ear headphones sounded bad. No low end, mid-rangy. Only manually pushing them I could get a better sound, but always too much towards the mids and mid-high frequencies.
I had higher expectations with them, knowing the brand. I thought they could be headphones I would like and trust to listen to music, and also being able to do exercises. I'm not 100% sure now, but I think I remember I couldn't keep them on while running and sweating.

reviews.title: Great Sound With Comfort And Stability
reviews.text:
This is an excellent set of Sports headphones that sounds great and stays put when you're getting your workout in. The headphones use a dual magnet, dynamic moving coil micro speaker to deliver a frequency response of 10HZ to 19kHz making them more than adequate for listening outside of the gym as well. While these headphones work with any device they are truly made for the Apple line of products (iPhone, iPad, iPod) as the control box gives you control over the volume, skip tracks and even take calls.

►► SOUND QUALITY ◄◄

The sound across the board is excellent from the low-end through the mid-range and high-end. They are not as open and airy as my Ultimate Ears TripleFi 10's, a set that listed for $399 retail, but they don't feel muted at all when listening to them.

Testing through a variety of music genres it would seem that these are tuned for the louder, upbeat music that you'd listen to while working out which makes sense since these are Sports headphones. With that said if I would have no problem listening to acoustic music through these as they product a nicely balanced, clean sound that is better than a lot of wired headsets I've tried. They are way better than the headphones included with my iPhone.

►► COMFORT ◄◄

For me comfort is just as important as sound quality because if your in-ear monitors aren't comfortable you won't want to wear them for extended periods of time. This set does a couple things right in the comfort arena with the design of the oval earbuds and the over the ear wire design that keeps the headphones in place and makes them feel as close to weightless as you can get.

I was a bit skeptical of the oval design of the earbuds as I am very used to the circular design and have been very happy with the Comply tips that I normally use. With that said the oval design here truly does seem to make a difference in the comfort of these tips as the included tips are more comfortable than most, if not all, of the standard tips I've had included in a set of headphones.

►► CONTROLS ◄◄

There is a small control box attached to the clip that you can use to keep the cord in place. The control box is very similar to those on other sets of headphones I have tested and it worked pretty much as expected except for the way you move up and down in the track list.

The top button on the control box is used to raise the volume on your device.

The bottom button on the control box is used to lower the volume on your device.

The center button is the most versatile as a quick click will play or pause your music or answer a call if the phone is ringing. A double tap of the center button will move to the next track in your track listing and a triple tap of the center button will move to the previous track. Pressing and holding the center button for a second will initiate Siri. While I am used to the volume buttons normally doubling up as the previous / next track control once I was used to this system it was a breeze to use.

►► PHONE CALLS ◄◄

The headset does a nice job with calls due to the fact that the microphone is nice and clear so there is no worries about taking a call while wearing these headphones.

►► CONCLUSION ◄◄

Overall this is an excellent set of Sports headphones that are both comfortable and sound great. They stay firmly in place and seem to be built to handle whatever wear and tear you will throw at them while working out. I love having full control over my iPhone with the included control. For me this is about as close to perfect as you can come with a Sports set of headphones. Highly recommended.

Sample provided for review.

reviews.title: Just right for me.
reviews.text: Diggin' these just fine. I can see how maybe people with tiny ears, or oddly shaped ears, might not have the right fit. Also, the portion in-ear is quite tiny, so there's not a huge amount of bass, but I still like the clarity, and there's enough adjustability to tailor the sound, even on my tiny Sandisc Mp3 player. What I like the most though, is the over the ear design, and I can have the wires feed out back out of my way. The portion in-ear, with the smallish oval tips, also makes me quite happy. So small, and un-noticeable, and comfortable, and they stay put till the end of my hike, or run, or skate, or whatever. The ones that came with the player sounded good too, but really annoying and would fall out when you get sweaty or turn your head. And I just didn't have a bunch of the new-style design to try out, with the horn on them that you rotate and lock into the ear. I read that those kind still fall out when sweaty and slippery anyway. (or you don't get the right fit). All problems solved with these sporty little guys. And Klipsch speakers and equipment have always impressed, so I'm glad I trusted my instincts...

I returned these. I think their getting rid of a later edition of these headphones that aren't as good as the ones they've previously sold. You can see other reviews saying the same thing. There's no noise cancelation either. So yeah, I think they're just lying about the ones they send you.

reviews.title: ... used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a

reviews.title: These Don't last.
reviews.text:
I was pretty sad to discover that these literally lasted one road trip from Oregon to Southern California. Roughly 20hrs of drive time so I used them for music and audio books. The sound quality was okay but not great. If we had a lot of road noise I couldn't hear anything on full volume
When I tried to use them for the return trip they were even quieter and the microphone wouldn't do more then a whisper on the other end. We tried multiple phones and multiple carriers to see if that was the issue
Another issue on the 2nd round was the amount of feedback we had on the line when calling or even listening to music. I thought my phone was broken or something till I turned my Bluetooth off and just used my phone speaker. I was really excited for this but won't buy them again.

reviews.title: I do not recommend these earbuds.  They have a serious design flaw.
reviews.text:
I would have easily given these earbuds 4 or 5 stars, if it wasn't for the "low battery" warning. JLAB clearly put no thought into this. Here are my issues:

1) The first low battery warning occurs about 5 minutes before the battery dies . So if you just started your jog, or just got on the bus, you're screwed. With 6 hours of play time, the low battery notification should give you at least 20 minutes notice. Since you are almost always "out and about" when listening to headphones, it would be nice to have enough juice to finish your activity or get where you are going.

2) The low battery message (which is verbal) repeats FREQUENTLY for the brief remainder of your battery life, constantly interrupting your music. This is so annoying you wind up taking the earbuds off.

Since the earbuds are essentially useless once you get the first low battery warning, the warning serves no purpose. Giving the low battery warnings at the 30, 20 and 10 minute marks would be far less annoying and actually give you a chance to get to a charger.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Very nice

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

reviews.title: Amazing ear pad replacements for the Logitech G35 headset!
reviews.text:
- Makes my G35 headset look better than when I bought it new thanks to the red accent markings!
- The installation tool was extremely helpful, and thanks for including it.
- Just a bit of warning for others the kit that includes the head pad isn’t mean for the Logitech G35 headset, because it is a different size and it doesn’t have Velcro underneath the head pad. I just ordered the ear pads only, and ended up using the spare two fake leather head pads that came with my G35 headset.
- Other thoughts: Not sure what some people are complaining about, but my ear pads are comfortable and fit my headset well. I’m just going to assume some peoples ears are extremely sensitive than others to certain fabrics. I like the cloth mesh pads compared to the original leather pads for two reasons. The cloth won’t crack or peel off like the leather pads, and the cloth pads are more breathable for the ears (ears won’t get hot or humid).

reviews.title: They are comfortable, which is the main thing
reviews.text: I bought these for my G930 since the outside was flaking off of mine a lot. I have been using these for almost 5 months and I have had no issues out of them. They are comfortable, which is the main thing. And since it isn't the fake leather of the original, I dont have a problem with it causing my ears to sweat or stick to it. Installing them were simple as well.

reviews.title: Barely noticeable difference between these pads and the official Logitech pads
reviews.text: The only difference in these pads is that the mesh is slightly rougher than that of the ear pads that come with the Logitech G430 headphones. Otherwise, there is no noticeable difference.

reviews.title: great replacement for my G930
reviews.text: I bought these blue mesh ear pads to replace my original fake leather pads on my Logitech G930 headphones. These went on super easily, took no effort, and are a perfect fit. They also come with a little tool to help slide the pads on but i didn't even need it. I also like the mesh pads because my ears stay a bit cooler than on the original leather-ish ones. These are a great value for the price, and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Good but scratchy.
reviews.text: They fit perfectly on my Logitech g35s but they are very scratchy.

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

Very easy to use and control volume or make calls or use siri voice. It has a shocking deep bass for better sound quality

reviews.title: Cute gift
reviews.text: They ate adorable bought them for my 8 year old nieces birthday. She loves them and uses them everyday. I haven't put them in my ears but if there was a problem she would let me know. Makes a great gift for a child.

reviews.title: Fits a child just right
reviews.text: The young lady loved them.  And kept us from hearing the games etc

Junk- won’t even charge fresh out of the box.
Don’t waste your money on these. They’re cute but don’t work at all!!

reviews.title: Worth it for kids 1st pair.
reviews.text: My son wanted his own wireless ear vuds, he's 7. He doesn't need anything too expensive.  So he bought these with his birthday $. Good first starter pair. The only thing I will say. It can be a little annoying to switch between devices to get buds to sync. Other than that they are great. Battery life is good. Sound quality is great

title: Beats Studio3 Wireless Noise Cancelling Over-Ear Headphones - Apple W1 Headphone Chip, Class 1 Bluetooth, Active Noise Cancelling, 22 Hours of Listening Time - Blue (Previous Model)
features: High-performance wireless noise cancelling headphones in blue
Compatible with iOS and Android devices.
Pure adaptive noise canceling (pure ANC) actively blocks external noise
Real-time Audio calibration preserves a Premium listening experience
Up to 22 hours of battery life enables full-featured all-day wireless playback

reviews.title: Better then beats solo
reviews.text: Beats STUDIO  covers the ear Beats SOLO  sits on top of the ear both are excellent sound but I prefer Studio because they cover my ear instead of pressing down on my ear after a while with my beats SOLO pressing down it hurts my ear so I’m a Beats studio fan NOW

reviews.title: Love them!
reviews.text: Great product, still loving it!

reviews.title: He Loves Them!!!!!!
reviews.text: Honest & True: This was a gift for the big guy because he travels a lot for work. He can't get enough of them. He wears them around the house and in the car. You can use them as headphones while using your phone to talk. So they are handy for people looking for good clear sound quality, and when speaking with others via phone, it projects a clear voice to the person on the other end.

title: elago Silicone Case Designed for Samsung Galaxy Buds Plus Case (2020) / Galaxy Buds Case (2019) - (Top - Lovely Pink/Bottom - Lavender)
features: 【FULL BODY PROTECTION】 The case is made from flexible, shock-resistant, and soft feeling silicone material to protect your Galaxy Buds from dust, metal, scratch, and external impacts. Case ensures efficient heat dissipation.

【ADHESIVE GEL PAD】 Gel pad inside the top and bottom of the elago galaxy buds case holds to the case and does not peel off easily. Please remove the gel pad film before use. (No adhesive residue is left on the product after you remove the elago case.)

【PERFECT FIT WITH OPEN CHARGING PORT】 You don't have to remove the silicone cover to charge Galaxy Buds. Have easy access to all functions and charge without any interference! (Galaxy buds and charging case are NOT included)
【FULLY OPEN】 Case open all the way (up to 100-degree) without any issues.
【WARRANTY】 Purchase with confidence! 30-days 100% Money Back Guarantee & 1-year replacement warranty.

reviews.title: Poor quality!
reviews.text: The adhesive strips are poorly placed and they don't hold up for more then a week. I bought the glow in the dark case and it stopped working in a day I wouldn't recommend this to anyone!

reviews.title: good idea bad adhesive
reviews.text: good idea bad adhesive. It keeps on coming off so i end up using different adhesive until I change to the different case.

reviews.title: Is not what I expect
